regional_cost_note: Builders in Hamilton typically charge $80–$110/hr. New build costs range $2,500–$3,800/m². Waikato region rates are generally 10–15% lower than Auckland. Most local firms offer fixed-price contracts for new builds.

businesses.name: Harpley Building Limited
businesses.known_for: Hamilton-area LBP builder specialising in residential renovations, extensions, kitchens, bathrooms, and windows and doors.

businesses.name: S K Ruru Construction Ltd
businesses.known_for: NZ-qualified LBP builder with 13 years' experience in renovations, house extensions, new builds, kitchens, and bathrooms across Waikato.

businesses.name: Tu Kaha Building Limited
businesses.known_for: Family-owned LBP and NZCB-member Hamilton builder specialising in home renovations, new builds, and extensions.

businesses.name: Prescott Builders Ltd
businesses.known_for: Cambridge-based Waikato builder with 14 years' experience in architectural homes, renovations, decks, fences, and kitchens.

businesses.name: S F Contracting
businesses.known_for: LBP Hamilton builder with 10 years' experience in house construction, renovations, extensions, decks, fences, kitchens, and bathrooms.
